SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.data

Class FirebaseRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.data.FirebaseRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
CommentRepository, EventRepository, ImageRepository, NotificationRepository, UserRepository, WaitingListRepository
public class FirebaseRepository extends Object implements UserRepository, EventRepository, WaitingListRepository, NotificationRepository, CommentRepository, ImageRepository
Repository class responsible for interacting with Firebase Firestore. (Handles CRUD operations for users, events, and waiting lists.) This repository is responsible for Firestore reads and writes for users, events, waiting-list entries, and admin-device checks. Role: repository/data-access layer used by service classes. Outstanding issues: validation rules are intentionally minimal, several methods are direct pass-throughs, and the class directly constructs FirebaseFirestore which limits testability.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FirebaseRepository()
    Initializes the FirebaseRepository with the default Firestore instance.
    FirebaseRepository(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db)
    Initializes the FirebaseRepository with a provided Firestore instance.

    • saveEvent

      public void saveEvent(@NonNull Event event, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Saves or updates an event in Firestore. If the event has no ID, a new document is created and the ID is updated.
      Specified by:
      saveEvent in interface EventRepository
      Parameters:
      event - The event to save.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • deleteEvent

      public void deleteEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Deletes an event from Firestore by its ID.
      Specified by:
      deleteEvent in interface EventRepository
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier of the event.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • deleteEventsByOrganizer

      public void deleteEventsByOrganizer(@NonNull String organizerUid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Deletes all events whose organizerUid matches the given UID. Each matching event document is deleted individually. The onSuccess callback is invoked once after all deletions complete. If any single deletion fails, onFailure is called immediately and remaining deletions are abandoned.
      Specified by:
      deleteEventsByOrganizer in interface EventRepository
      Parameters:
      organizerUid - The UID of the organizer whose events should be deleted.
      onSuccess - Callback invoked when all events have been deleted.
      onFailure - Callback invoked if the query or any deletion fails.

      public void getAllUsers(@NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<UserProfile>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all user profiles from Firestore.
      Specified by:
      getAllUsers in interface UserRepository
      Parameters:
      onSuccess - Callback receiving a list of all user profiles.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

      Retrieves a specific waiting list entry for a user and event.
      Specified by:
      getWaitingListEntry in interface WaitingListRepository
      Parameters:
      eventId - The ID of the event.
      entrantUid - The UID of the entrant.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the WaitingListEntry (null if not found).
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

      public void getWaitingEntriesCount(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull WaitingListStatus status, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Integer> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Description copied from interface: WaitingListRepository
      Counts waiting-list entries for an event that have the given status. More efficient than getAllWaitingListEntries when only a count is needed.
      Specified by:
      getWaitingEntriesCount in interface WaitingListRepository

    • getAllComments

      public void getAllComments(@NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<EventComment>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Specified by:
      getAllComments in interface CommentRepository

    • setPinnedComment

      public void setPinnedComment(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull List<EventComment> previousPinned, @NonNull EventComment newComment, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<EventComment> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Description copied from interface: CommentRepository
      Atomically unpins every comment in previousPinned and creates newComment as the new pinned comment, using a single WriteBatch commit. The new comment's ID and eventId are set by the implementation before writing.
      Specified by:
      setPinnedComment in interface CommentRepository

    • subscribeComments

      @NonNull public com.google.firebase.firestore.ListenerRegistration subscribeComments(@NonNull String eventId, @Nullable String parentCommentId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<EventComment>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Specified by:
      subscribeComments in interface CommentRepository

      toggleCommentLike in interface CommentRepository
